issue_summary: Improved encoding support for ZIPs, now with Cp437 for JDK 1.4. Submitted by Wolfgang Glas.
javadoc_before: /** * Assemble as unicode extension from the name/comment and * encoding of the orginal zip entry. * * @param text The file name or comment. * @param zipEncoding The encoding of the filenames in the zip * file, usually "CP437". */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Assemble as unicode extension from the name/comment and
     * encoding of the orginal zip entry.
     * 
     * @param text The file name or comment.
     * @param bytes The encoded of the filename or comment in the zip
     * file.
     */
